VO_EN: You don't know why.
VO_VI: Ban khong biet tai sao.

VO_EN: You pull up a report from last year. Your handwriting. Every detail clean.
VO_VI: Ban mo bao cao nam ngoai. Chu ban. Moi chi tiet sach se.

VO_EN: You can't tell which details are real.
VO_VI: Ban khong phan biet duoc chi tiet nao la that.

VO_EN: Phone rings. Two in the morning.
VO_VI: Dien thoai reo. Hai gio sang.

VO_EN: Same voice. Same fear.
VO_VI: Cung giong noi. Cung noi so.

VO_EN: Same silence before they tell you what happened.
VO_VI: Cung khoang im lang truoc khi ho noi.

VO_EN: You're already reaching for the gloves.
VO_VI: Ban da voi lay gang tay roi.

VO_EN: They're on the nightstand. They've been on the nightstand since the first year.
VO_VI: Gang tay nam tren tu dau giuong. Tu nam dau tien da nam do.

VO_EN: You don't ask what happened. You haven't asked in years.
VO_VI: Ban khong hoi chuyen gi. Da nhieu nam khong hoi.

VO_EN: You're dressed before they finish talking.
VO_VI: Ban mac xong truoc khi ho noi het.

VO_EN: It doesn't matter what happened.
VO_VI: Chuyen gi xay ra khong quan trong.

VO_EN: Only what it needs to look like.
VO_VI: Chi la no can trong nhu the nao.

VO_EN: You arrive second.
VO_VI: Ban den sau.

VO_EN: You always do.
VO_VI: Luon la vay.

VO_EN: You don't remember what it was anymore.
VO_VI: Ban khong con nho 'no' la gi nua.

VO_EN: You only remember what it looked like.
VO_VI: Ban chi nho no trong nhu the nao.
